seoTitle: Outer Harbor vs Ovingham — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Outer Harbor and Ovingham. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Outer Harbor vs Ovingham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Outer Harbor and Ovingham.
heading: Outer Harbor vs Ovingham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Outer Harbor, South Australia and Ovingham, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Outer Harbor has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Ovingham (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Outer Harbor or Ovingham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Outer Harbor has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Ovingham scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Outer Harbor scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Ovingham scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Outer Harbor or Ovingham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Outer Harbor has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
